BIH-QAT.summary: Bosnia-Herzegovina finished third with four points, making them a strong best-third contender. Qatar is eliminated.

SUI-CAN.summary: Switzerland and Canada both qualified for the knockout stage, finishing first and second respectively in the group.

MAR-HAI.summary: Morocco qualified for the knockout stage. Haiti is eliminated, finishing last in the group with zero points.

SCO-BRA.summary: Brazil qualified for the knockout stage. Scotland finished third with three points, holding a slim best-third chance.

CZE-MEX.summary: Mexico qualified for the knockout stage. Czechia is eliminated, finishing last in the group with one point.

RSA-KOR.summary: South Africa qualified for the knockout stage. South Korea finished third with three points, holding a slim best-third chance.

CUW-CIV.summary: Ivory Coast has secured qualification for the knockout stage. Curaçao is definitively eliminated from the tournament.

ECU-GER.summary: Germany has qualified for the knockout stage. Ecuador finished third with 4 points, hoping for a best-3rd spot.

JPN-SWE.summary: Japan has qualified for the knockout stage. Sweden finished third with 4 points, hoping for a best-3rd spot.

TUN-NED.summary: Netherlands has secured qualification for the knockout stage. Tunisia is definitively eliminated from the tournament.

TUR-USA.summary: United States has secured qualification for the knockout stage. Türkiye is definitively eliminated from the tournament.

NOR-FRA.summary: Both teams are already qualified for the knockout stage. This match determines who finishes first in Group I.

SEN-IRQ.summary: Both Senegal and Iraq have lost their first two matches, but a win today gives either side 3 points — a slim but genuine best-third chance at the knockout stage.

CPV-KSA.summary: Cape Verde needs a win for a realistic chance at top two or best third. Saudi Arabia must win to avoid elimination.

URU-ESP.summary: Spain needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Uruguay must win to guarantee a top-two spot.

EGY-IRN.summary: Egypt needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Iran must win to guarantee a top-two spot.

USA-PAR.summary: USA has qualified, competing for first place. Paraguay needs a win or draw to secure automatic qualification or a strong third-place spot.

HAI-SCO.summary: Haiti and Scotland are both already eliminated from the tournament, with no path to advance.

BEL-EGY.summary: Egypt needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Belgium needs a win to advance automatically.

IRN-NZL.summary: Iran needs a win to guarantee top-two qualification. New Zealand needs a win to have any chance of advancing.

FRA-SEN.summary: France is already qualified and seeks to win the group. Senegal is eliminated and plays for pride.

IRQ-NOR.summary: Norway is already qualified and seeks to win the group. Iraq is eliminated and plays for pride.

ARG-ALG.summary: Argentina needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Algeria needs a win for automatic qualification.

AUT-JOR.summary: Austria needs a win for automatic qualification or a strong third-place finish; Jordan is already eliminated.

GHA-PAN.summary: Ghana needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification; Panama is already eliminated from the World Cup.

UZB-COL.summary: Uzbekistan is already eliminated from the World Cup; Colombia is already qualified for the knockout stage.

CZE-RSA.summary: South Africa qualified automatically in second place. Czechia finished last with one point and is eliminated.

CAN-QAT.summary: Canada qualified automatically in second place. Qatar finished last with one point and is eliminated.

MEX-KOR.summary: Mexico qualified automatically in first place. South Korea finished third with three points and is eliminated.

USA-AUS.summary: USA is qualified, playing for group winner. Australia needs a win or draw to secure top-2 or a strong third-place finish.

SCO-MAR.summary: Morocco has qualified for the knockout stage. Scotland finished third, unlikely to advance as a best third-place team.

BRA-HAI.summary: Brazil has qualified as group winner. Haiti finished last with zero points, thus eliminated from the tournament.

NED-SWE.summary: Netherlands qualified as group winners. Sweden finished third with 4 points, likely advancing as a best third-place team.

GER-CIV.summary: Germany qualified as group winners. Ivory Coast qualified as group runners-up. Both teams are through to the knockout stage.

ECU-CUW.summary: Ecuador finished third with 4 points, likely advancing as a best third-place team. Curaçao is eliminated.

TUN-JPN.summary: Japan needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Tunisia is already eliminated from contention.

BEL-IRN.summary: Both Belgium and Iran need a win to guarantee top-two qualification. A draw or loss risks elimination for either team.

URU-CPV.summary: Both Uruguay and Cape Verde need a win to guarantee top-two qualification. A draw or loss risks elimination for either team.

NZL-EGY.summary: Egypt is already qualified for the knockout stage. New Zealand must win to have any chance of advancing as second or a best third-place team.

ARG-AUT.summary: Argentina needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Austria needs a win for top-two, or a draw for a strong third-place.

NOR-SEN.summary: Norway is already qualified, competing for group winner. Senegal needs a win for a slim chance at best third-place qualification.

COL-COD.summary: Colombia is qualified, playing for group winner. Congo DR must win for a strong best third-place chance.

CRO-GHA.summary: Ghana needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two. Croatia needs a win for top-two, or a draw for best-third chance.

PAN-ENG.summary: England needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two. Panama must win to have any chance at best-third.

COL-POR.summary: Both teams are already qualified for the knockout stage. They are competing for first place in the group.

ALG-AUT.summary: Both teams need a win for a strong top-two chance, or a draw for a solid best-third position.

JOR-ARG.summary: Argentina is already qualified and playing for first place. Jordan must win to have any best-third chance.

RSA-CAN.summary: South Africa (2nd in Group A, 4pts) meets Group B winners Canada (4pts, 8 GF). Winner advances, loser is eliminated in this knockout match.

BRA-JPN.summary: Brazil, topping Group C with 7 points, faces Japan, second in Group F with 5 points. Winner advances, loser is eliminated.

GER-PAR.summary: Germany, second in Group E with 6 points, battles Paraguay, Group D winners with 4 points. Victory means advancing; defeat ends their World Cup journey.

NED-MAR.summary: Group F winners Netherlands (7 points) meet Morocco, second in Group C with 7 points. Winner progresses, loser is eliminated.

CIV-NOR.summary: Ivory Coast, 3rd in Group E with 6 points, battles Norway, Group I winners also with 6 points. Winner advances, loser is eliminated.

FRA-SWE.summary: France, 2nd in Group I with 9 points, faces Sweden, 2nd in Group F with 4 points. Winner advances, loser is eliminated.

MEX-ECU.summary: Mexico, Group A winners with 9 points and 0 goals conceded, battles Ecuador, Group E winners with 4 points. Winner advances, loser eliminated.

ENG-COD.summary: Group L winners England (7pts) meet Congo DR, who placed 4th in Group K (4pts). Winner progresses, loser is eliminated.

BEL-SEN.summary: Group G winners Belgium (5pts) face Senegal, who finished 3rd in Group I (3pts). Winner advances, loser is eliminated.

USA-BIH.summary: USA, who placed 4th in Group D (6pts), meet Bosnia-Herzegovina, 2nd in Group B (4pts). Winner progresses, loser is eliminated.
